meaningExtended: Plural neuter present passive participle of the verb kṛ (to do/make), indicating actions that are being performed or are in the process of being done.

sentences.devanagari: वेदे क्रियमाणानि कर्माणि सर्वदा फलं दायक भवन्ति।
sentences.transliteration: vede kriyamāṇāni karmāṇi sarvadā phalaṃ dāyaka bhavanti.
sentences.english: The actions being performed in the Vedas always yield fruits.

sentences.devanagari: मन्दिरे क्रियमाणानि पूजाविधीनि देवताभ्यः प्रिय आसन्।
sentences.transliteration: mandire kriyamāṇāni pūjāvidhīni devatābhyaḥ priya āsan.
sentences.english: The worship rituals being performed in the temple were pleasing to the deities.
The austerities being performed in the future will lead to liberation.

sentences.devanagari: कथं क्रियमाणानि कार्याणि सफलानि भवितुं शक्यन्ते?
sentences.transliteration: kathaṃ kriyamāṇāni kāryāṇi saphalaāni bhavituṃ śakyante?
sentences.english: How can the tasks being performed become successful?
To whom are the sacrifices being performed dedicated?

sentences.devanagari: अहं पश्यामि क्रियमाणानि कर्माणि सर्वत्र जगति।
sentences.transliteration: ahaṃ paśyāmi kriyamāṇāni karmāṇi sarvatra jagati.
sentences.english: I see the actions being performed everywhere in the world.

sentences.devanagari: त्वं कथयस्व कि क्रियमाणानि कार्याणि तव सुखकरानि सन्ति?
sentences.transliteration: tvaṃ kathayasva ki kriyamāṇāni kāryāṇi tava sukhakarāni santi?
sentences.english: Tell me, are the works being done by you bringing you happiness?

sentences.devanagari: द्वे क्रियमाणे कार्ये पारस्परिकं सहायतां प्रदातः।
sentences.transliteration: dve kriyamāṇe kārye pārasparikṃ sahāyatāṃ pradātaḥ.
sentences.english: The two works being done provide mutual assistance to each other.

sentences.devanagari: विविधानि क्रियमाणानि कार्याणि मनुष्याणां जीवने उन्नति साधयन्ति।
sentences.transliteration: vividhāni kriyamāṇāni kāryāṇi manuṣyāṇāṃ jīvane unnati sādhayanti.
sentences.english: The various works being performed accomplish progress in human life.

sentences.devanagari: यानि क्रियमाणानि कार्याणि मनोभावसंपन्नानि भवन्ति, तानि एव शाश्वतफलं प्रयच्छन्ति।
sentences.transliteration: yāni kriyamāṇāni kāryāṇi manobhāvasaṃpannāni bhavanti, tāni eva śāśvataphalaṃ prayacchanti.
sentences.english: Those works being done with pure intention alone grant eternal fruit.
